project_summary: Small Python todo app with a list_todos helper and pytest coverage.
assumptions: The completed filter should be optional so existing callers continue to receive all todos.
risks: Changing the list_todos signature requires tests to cover backward compatibility.

tasks.title: Add optional completed filter to list_todos
tasks.goal: Allow callers to filter todos by completed status while preserving the existing default behavior.
tasks.context: todo_app/todos.py exposes list_todos, and tests/test_todos.py covers current behavior.
acceptance_criteria: Calling list_todos(todos) still returns all todos.
Calling list_todos(todos, completed=true) returns only completed todos.
Calling list_todos(todos, completed=false) returns only incomplete todos.
